## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands run, scenarios covered. New behavior should come with tests. -->

- [ ] `pytest tests -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes. -->
